content:
墊腳💃旋轉🕺，伴著校慶盛大的音樂與舞伴跳一曲華爾茲~
守密人會牽手哪位喚醒體漫步舞池呢？活動開啟後，在留言區分享你的舞伴，有機會收穫「驚喜」~

⭐**活動時間：**5 月 26 日 9:00 - 6 月 9 日 9:00 

⭐**活動介紹：**必得活動喚醒「未被忘卻的」
 ▍活動期間將開放4個界域喚醒，喚醒 5 次必得以下隨機SSR喚醒體 *1和隨機SSR命輪*1，並贈送 1 個「原初靈核」。
 ■ **混沌：**莉莉、「24」、萊克、哈姆林、塔薇；跨越疼痛、畸體回噬、好運時間、永恆安魂曲、隱世的轉輪。
 ■ **深海：**圖魯、墨菲、彌利亞姆；神王的頌歌、隱密的誕生、虔誠的偉力。
 ■ **血肉：**索蕾爾、薩爾瓦多、泰旖絲、血鏈‧希洛；以薔薇之名、神言石板、慈悲的哺育、沉入殷紅。
 ■ **超維：**達芙黛爾、旺達、奧爾拉；至為珍貴的收藏、女王的戒律、詩箋的句尾。
 ▍每個界域喚醒僅能進行 1 次「喚醒 5 次」，需要消耗 1000 源液。
 ▍首次進行活動喚醒，還可獲 ▒▒券×1

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

💃 On Tiptoe, Twirl 🕺, and Waltz Across the Floor at Mythag’s Enchanting Festival Soirée!
The grand music swells—who will show up to be your dance partner? Take the hand of your fated Awakener and glide through the night in a whirl of elegance and magic. 
During the event, share the Awakener you got in the comments below for a chance to win a special surprise!

⭐ **Event Time:**May 26th, 9:00 – June 9th, 9:00 (UTC+8)

⭐ **Event Details:**
 ▍**Guaranteed Event Awakening: "The Unforgotten"**
🔹 During the event, 4 Realms will be available. Perform 5× Awakenings to obtain: 
——Random Limited SSR Awakener ×1
——Random Limited SSR Wheel of Destiny ×1
——1 Gnosis Primer
🔹Available Domains & Awakeners:
——Chaos:  Lily, "24", Ryker, Hameln, Tawil┊Grace Through Pain, Aberrant Devour, Hour of Fortune, Eternal Requiem, Wheel Unseen
——Aequor:  Tulu, Murphy, Miryam┊Hymn of the Sovereign, Shrouded Birth, Power of the Pious
——Caro:  Sorel, Salvador, Thais, Helot: Catena┊By Rose Alone, Tablet of Scriptures, Merciful Nurturing, Drowning in Crimson
——Ultra:  Daffodil, Wanda, Horla┊Treasured Rarity, Queen's Edict, The Last Verse.

 ▍**Additional Rules:**
🔹You may only perform 5× Awakenings with 1000 Silver Prime in each of the 4 Realms once. 
🔹First-time participants will also receive ▒▒ Ticket ×1.
thread_title: 🎊必得召喚：牽手舞伴盡情旋轉吧┊Guaranteed Awakening: Dance with Your Fated Partner!

content:
⭐校慶舞台上巨大輪盤呼呼轉動，在萊克的好運Buff加成下，指針停在了最終大獎「數不清的▒▒▒▒」！
⭐在5 月 26 日 9:00- 6 月 9 日 9:00 期間，守密人累計登錄7天即可領取「無垢之芯」×▒▒、▒▒券×1

巨額獎勵從天而降，可惜數字被融蝕了…😢來算算一共有多少獎勵掉落在守密人身上吧！

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——
⭐The giant wheel spins on the school festival stage. With Ryker's Luck Buff, the pointer lands on the grand prize—"Countless ▒▒▒▒"!
⭐From May 26th 9:00 to June 9th 9:00 (UTC+8), Keepers who log in for 7 cumulative days will receive "Pure Core" ×▒▒ and ▒▒ Ticket ×1.

A massive reward rains from the sky, but the numbers are corroded...😢 Let’s calculate how much loot falls onto the Keepers!
thread_title: 🎊登錄就送：用幸運輪盤轉個好禮┊Login Bonus: Spin the Lucky Wheel for Gifts!
